title: HbA1c result review

examination.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.
examination.rationale: The exact DHA annual-review section supports measured vital signs, weight or BMI and focused assessment in adult type 2 diabetes.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

investigations.text: Supports clinician review of A1C and/or CGM metrics and an individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.
investigations.rationale: The exact ADA glycaemic-status section supports interval change, patient concerns, clinician-reviewed laboratory and home-monitoring documentation and previous correspondence when evaluating HbA1c; it does not interpret the result automatically.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of A1C and/or CGM metrics and an individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting clinician-discussed A1C or CGM goals, health and functional status, comorbidity, treatment risk, burden and shared preferences without automatically applying a numeric goal.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact individualised-goal section supports functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, clinician-entered plan, discussed safety net, arranged follow-up and patient questions only when discussed; no numeric goal is applied.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting clinician-discussed A1C or CGM goals, health and functional status, comorbidity, treatment risk, burden and shared preferences without automatically applying a numeric goal.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

source_limitations: HbA1c value, date, assay limitations, prior trend, diabetes type, pregnancy, hypoglycaemia, monitoring records, individual target, interpretation and treatment remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
